title: Weatherprufe is the best paint for your coastal home
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Weatherprufe is known as the...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Weatherprufe is known as the best paint for waterproof systems. It is also the paint that offers the best value for money.

On surfaces where many of the traditional waterproofing systems have failed, WeatherPrufe Paints, with its Elastocryl pure acrylic systems with full membrane, have become the top system for the long-term waterproofing of concrete roofs, parapet walls and the areas around windows, as well as underground waterproofing.


> In the Garden Route now is the best time to get your coastal home waterproof by using WeatherPrufe products.


WeatherPrufe Paints is a fully South Africa, privately-owned paint and waterproofing paint manufacturer with a specialty paint and waterproofing store in George.

WeatherPrufe Paints produces a comprehensive range of products, formulated to provide solutions to commonly encountered coating problems.

Quality products, strong technical service, honest and accurate advice, along with an eagerness to exceed customers’ expectations, have been the formula for their success enjoyed to date.

On surfaces where many of the traditional waterproofing systems have failed, WeatherPrufe Paints, with its Elastocryl pure acrylic systems with full membrane, have become the top system for the long-term waterproofing of concrete roofs, parapet walls and the areas around windows, as well as underground waterproofing.

Elastocryl is applied by hand and provides an optimal protective layer that is sun and water resistant and will provide many years of excellent protection.

Elastocryl has been proven in the industry as an excellent alternative for "torch on" waterproofing and can even be used in fish ponds.

WeatherPrufe paints are manufactured specifically for coastal conditions and provide the very best protection against the elements and moisture. They provide coastal homeowners with the best waterproofing acrylic product around, offering high quality, hassle-free paint, with a factory guarantee of up to 10 years.

WeatherPrufe Paints produces a comprehensive range of products, formulated to provide solutions to commonly encountered coating problems.

Contractors can buy large amounts of paint at the shop in George: Shop 21 in the Precap Centre in Courtenay Street.

Contact David (082 977 7802), Andrew (071 129 1321) or the WeatherPrufe branch (087 164 6086).

Supplied: Elastocryl Paint

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
